evals.expected_output: A structured code review identifying: SQL injection (blocker), plaintext password storage (blocker), no input validation (blocker), no error handling on DB operations (suggestion). Should include positive notes if any exist, and provide corrected code for the blockers.
expectations: Review identifies SQL injection as a blocker with specific location
Review identifies plaintext password storage as a blocker
Review provides an overall verdict (should be 'Request Changes' given severity)
Review includes at least one corrected code snippet
Review uses the structured format with sections for blockers vs suggestions

evals.expected_output: Code review noting: missing userId in useEffect dependency array (bug - stale data), no loading/error state handling (suggestion), no cleanup for in-flight requests on unmount (suggestion), missing TypeScript types (nit).
expectations: Review identifies missing userId in useEffect dependency array as at least a suggestion (it's a bug)
Review notes the lack of loading state or error state return
Review distinguishes between blockers/bugs and suggestions/nits

evals.prompt: I need a code review checklist template for our team's Go microservices. We care a lot about error handling, proper use of context, and not leaking goroutines.
evals.expected_output: A customized code review checklist template for Go microservices emphasizing: error handling patterns (errors.Is/As, wrapping), context propagation and cancellation, goroutine lifecycle management, and standard Go conventions.
expectations: Checklist includes Go-specific error handling items (errors.Is, errors.As, wrapping)
Checklist includes context.Context propagation as a review item
Checklist includes goroutine lifecycle and leak prevention
Checklist is formatted for reuse as a template (reviewers can check off items)
At least 10 specific checklist items are provided
